title: Docker Compose Skeleton Configuration
description: Complete configuration schema for DCS framework — used by /config/schema endpoint and the UI for dynamic form generation

APP_DATA_DIR.description: Persistent data directory for container volumes (relative to each stack)

PUID.description: User ID for container file permissions

PGID.description: Group ID for container file permissions

PROXY_DOMAIN.description: Primary domain for reverse proxy routing

SERVER_NAME.description: Friendly name for this server instance

stacks.title: Stack Management
stacks.description: Service stack startup and shutdown behavior

DOCKER_STACKS.default: core-infrastructure networking-security monitoring-management development-tools media-services web-applications storage-backup communication-collaboration entertainment-personal miscellaneous-services
DOCKER_STACKS.description: Space-separated stack categories (defines startup order, shutdown is reversed)

CONTINUE_ON_FAILURE.description: Continue starting remaining stacks if one fails

SKIP_HEALTHCHECK_WAIT.description: Skip waiting for healthchecks during startup (faster but riskier)

STACK_START_TIMEOUT.description: Max seconds to wait for a single stack to start

REMOVE_VOLUMES_ON_STOP.description: Remove named volumes when stopping stacks (DESTRUCTIVE)

docker.title: Docker Configuration
docker.description: Docker daemon and container management settings

REMOVE_ORPHANED_CONTAINERS.description: Remove orphaned containers during startup cleanup

FORCE_RECREATE.description: Force recreate containers on every start

AGGRESSIVE_IMAGE_PRUNE.description: Prune ALL unused images after updates (vs only dangling)

NTFY_URL.description: NTFY server endpoint URL (leave empty to disable)

UPDATE_NOTIFICATION.description: Send notification after image update cycle

logging.title: Logging
logging.description: Log output, rotation, and structured logging

LOG_MAX_SIZE.description: Max log file size before rotation

LOG_BACKUP_COUNT.description: Number of rotated log files to keep

ENABLE_STRUCTURED_LOGGING.description: Enable JSONL structured log output alongside plain text

api.title: REST API
api.description: Built-in REST API server for remote management

API_BIND.description: API bind address (0.0.0.0 for all interfaces)

API_RATE_LIMIT.description: Max requests per minute per IP (0 = disabled)

ENABLE_POST_STARTUP_HEALTH_CHECK.description: Run health check after startup sequence

HEALTH_CHECK_DELAY.description: Seconds to wait before health check (stabilization)

metrics.title: Metrics & Trending
metrics.description: Persistent time-series metrics for historical analysis

METRICS_RETENTION_DAYS.description: Days to retain historical metrics data

ROLLBACK_MAX_SNAPSHOTS.description: Max snapshots to keep per stack

SECRETS_ENCRYPTION.description: Encrypt secrets at rest using AES-256-CBC

plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.description: Extension system for custom templates and hooks

PLUGINS_HOOKS_ENABLED.description: Allow plugins to execute hooks on system events

BACKUP_RETENTION_COUNT.description: Number of backup archives to keep
